name: Flautas De Pollo Mjnt73c
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small pan, sauté the garlic and onion in oil until translucent.
2. Add the tomato and continue frying.
3. Add the chicken, salt, and pepper. Fry for 3-4 more minutes. Remove from heat.
4. Heat about 1 inch corn oil in another frypan on medium-high heat.
5. Use good quality, thin tortillas that are 6-7 inches long. Place a heaping tablespoon of the chicken filling into each tortilla.
6. Carefully roll them up as tightly as possible and secure with 3-4 toothpicks.
7. Fry each flauta in the oil until the tortilla is crisp and golden. Continue until all 12 are made.
Accompaniments: Salsa fresca or guacamole crème fraîche
